description_long: This is a tall, freestanding cabinet with a classic design, featuring a two-part structure. The upper section has two large glass-panel doors with four panes each, allowing visibility into the interior shelving, which is ideal for displaying items. The lower section consists of three drawers and two solid doors, providing concealed storage space. The cabinet is painted in a light gray or off-white color and is accented with brass or gold-toned handles and hardware. The overall construction appears to be wood, with a smooth, matte finish and subtle decorative molding along the top and base. The back and sides are solid, with no visible openings or additional features.
description: A tall, classic-style cabinet with glass-paneled upper doors and solid lower drawers and doors, finished in light gray with brass hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing glass-paneled upper doors, three drawers, and two lower solid doors with brass handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth and the stepped profile between the upper and lower sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid back with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the depth and stepped profile seen in view 1.
